runs.outcome: go test ./internal/cli/ -count=1 -> ok (15.2s), including this test, TestGenCRUDPermissionKeys, and every pre-existing generator/scaffold test.

harness_note: Reuses buildRenderedProduct (internal/cli/scaffold_test.go:568) — the existing isolated-temp-dir scaffold primitive (init -> replace-to-local-checkout -> go mod tidy) — rather than reimplementing it, per the story's shared-primitive direction. The seed catalog the boot requires is derived VERBATIM from the RouteMeta permission strings in the generated widget.go, so the boot proof always tracks what the template actually emitted. Boot runs without a database: app.Boot's registration validation (permission key shape, closed verb set, route-permission declaration) executes before any pool use; kernel.New requires only a TxManager, satisfied by a no-op stub whose methods are unreachable during Boot.
ci_wiring: The test lives in package cli and is gated only by testing.Short(). CI runs the full suite without -short: Makefile `test-unit` = `go test ./...` (Makefile:163-165), invoked by the containerized CI legs (Makefile:325-326). Adding the file therefore wires it into every future CI run touching internal/cli or the kernel verb set.
